message:
fix: XSS escape title, wrap errors, improve OPFS cache cleanup

- Escape HTML title in main.go export path (matches viewer_embed.go)
- Wrap bare error returns with fmt.Errorf context
- Fix OPFS cleanup: collect-then-remove to avoid mutation during iteration
- Add stale cache cleanup after network load (not just cache hit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
